PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)' && git branch --show-current | grep -qE '^(main|master)$'; then echo 'Blocked: do not commit directly to main/master' >&2; exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git push.*(--force|-f)'; then echo 'Blocked: force push is not allowed' >&2; exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git add' && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(\.env|credentials|secrets)'; then echo 'Blocked: do not commit secret files' >&2; exit 1; fi

PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|js|tsx|jsx|py|go|rs|java|rb)$' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(test|spec|_test)'; then echo 'Source file written — tests may need updating'; fi
